description: Haas tezgahlarinin active / running / stopped / offline yuzde dagilimi, program calisma suresi ve ACTIVE calisma suresi. State haritalamasi: OFFLINE=reachable=false, STOPPED=Execution=UNAVAILABLE, ACTIVE=Execution=ACTIVE, RUNNING=diger. PartCount Haas agent'i yayinlamadigi icin parca sayisi yerine ACTIVE suresi gosterilir.

panels.description: Her tezgahin son 10 dakikadaki en guncel durumu. ACTIVE=yesil, RUNNING=mavi, STOPPED=turuncu, OFFLINE=kirmizi.

targets.query:
status = from(bucket: "mtconnect")
  |> range(start: -10m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "mtconnect_status" and r._field == "reachable")
  |> last()
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ machine_id: r.machine_id, machine_name: r.machine_name, metric: "reachable", val: if r._value then "true" else "false" }))

exec = from(bucket: "mtconnect")
  |> range(start: -10m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "mtconnect" and r.item_type == "Execution" and r._field == "value_str")
  |> last()
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ machine_id: r.machine_id, machine_name: r.machine_name, metric: "execution", val: r._value }))

union(tables: [status, exec])
  |> group(columns: ["machine_id", "machine_name"])
  |> pivot(rowKey: ["machine_id", "machine_name"], columnKey: ["metric"], valueColumn: "val")
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({
      _time: now(),
      _field: r.machine_name,
      _value:
        if r.reachable == "false" then "OFFLINE"
        else if not exists r.execution then "STOPPED"
        else if r.execution == "ACTIVE" then "ACTIVE"
        else if r.execution == "UNAVAILABLE" then "STOPPED"
        else "RUNNING"
  }))
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_field", "_value"])
  |> group(columns: ["_field"])

panels.title: Tezgah anlik durumu

panels.description: Secili tarih araliginda her tezgah icin state yuzdeleri. Hesap: state'teki snapshot sayisi x 2sn / pencere suresi.

targets.query:
poll = 2.0
window_sec = float(v: int(v: v.timeRangeStop) - int(v: v.timeRangeStart)) / 1000000000.0

offline = from(bucket: "mtconnect")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "mtconnect_status" and r._field == "reachable" and r._value == false)
  |> group(columns: ["machine_id", "machine_name"])
  |> count()
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({
      _time: now(),
      machine_id: r.machine_id,
      machine_name: r.machine_name,
      state: "OFFLINE",
      _value: float(v: r._value) * poll * 100.0 / window_sec
  }))

exec_states = from(bucket: "mtconnect")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "mtconnect" and r.item_type == "Execution" and r._field == "value_str")
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ r with state:
      if r._value == "ACTIVE" then "ACTIVE"
      else if r._value == "UNAVAILABLE" then "STOPPED"
      else "RUNNING"
  }))
  |> group(columns: ["machine_id", "machine_name", "state"])
  |> count()
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({
      _time: now(),
      machine_id: r.machine_id,
      machine_name: r.machine_name,
      state: r.state,
      _value: float(v: r._value) * poll * 100.0 / window_sec
  }))

union(tables: [offline, exec_states])
  |> pivot(rowKey: ["machine_name"], columnKey: ["state"], valueColumn: "_value")

panels.title: State yuzdeleri (tezgah basina)

panels.description: Toplam dagilim (tum tezgahlar). Pasta dilimleri state surelerini gosterir (saniye).

targets.query:
poll = 2.0

offline = from(bucket: "mtconnect")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "mtconnect_status" and r._field == "reachable" and r._value == false)
  |> group()
  |> count()
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ _time: now(), state: "OFFLINE", _value: float(v: r._value) * poll }))

exec_states = from(bucket: "mtconnect")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "mtconnect" and r.item_type == "Execution" and r._field == "value_str")
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ r with state:
      if r._value == "ACTIVE" then "ACTIVE"
      else if r._value == "UNAVAILABLE" then "STOPPED"
      else "RUNNING"
  }))
  |> group(columns: ["state"])
  |> count()
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ _time: now(), state: r.state, _value: float(v: r._value) * poll }))

union(tables: [offline, exec_states])
  |> pivot(rowKey: ["_time"], columnKey: ["state"], valueColumn: "_value")

panels.title: Toplam state dagilimi (tum tezgahlar)

panels.description: Tezgahlarin secili zaman araliginda state degisim cizelgesi.

targets.query:
reach = from(bucket: "mtconnect")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "mtconnect_status" and r._field == "reachable")
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ _time: r._time, machine_name: r.machine_name, _value: if r._value then "_ONLINE" else "OFFLINE" }))

exec = from(bucket: "mtconnect")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "mtconnect" and r.item_type == "Execution" and r._field == "value_str")
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ _time: r._time, machine_name: r.machine_name, _value: if r._value == "ACTIVE" then "ACTIVE" else if r._value == "UNAVAILABLE" then "STOPPED" else "RUNNING" }))

union(tables: [reach, exec])
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._value != "_ONLINE")
  |> group(columns: ["machine_name"])
  |> sort(columns: ["_time"])
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: last, createEmpty: false)

panels.title: State zaman cizelgesi

panels.description: Tarih araliginda her tezgah icin calistirilan program ve toplam calisma suresi. % sutunu o programin secili pencerede ne kadar sure isgal ettigini gosterir.

targets.query:
poll = 2.0
window_sec = float(v: int(v: v.timeRangeStop) - int(v: v.timeRangeStart)) / 1000000000.0

from(bucket: "mtconnect")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "mtconnect" and r.item_type == "Program" and r._field == "value_str")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._value != "UNAVAILABLE" and r._value != "")
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ r with program: r._value }))
  |> drop(columns: ["_value"])
  |> group(columns: ["machine_name", "program"])
  |> reduce(
      identity: {count: 0, last: time(v: 0)},
      fn: (r, accumulator) => ({
        count: accumulator.count + 1,
        last: if r._time > accumulator.last then r._time else accumulator.last
      })
    )
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({
      machine_name: r.machine_name,
      program: r.program,
      duration_s: float(v: r.count) * poll,
      pct: float(v: r.count) * poll * 100.0 / window_sec,
      last_seen: r.last
  }))

panels.title: Program calisma suresi (tezgah / program)

panels.description: Aralikta tezgah basina ACTIVE durumunda gecirilen toplam sure (saat). NOT: Haas MTConnect agent'i PartCount yayinlamadigi icin gercek parca sayisi yerine ACTIVE calisma suresi gosterilir. Parca sayisi icin Haas tarafinda PartCount data item'i etkin edilmelidir.

targets.query:
poll = 2.0

from(bucket: "mtconnect")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "mtconnect" and r.item_type == "Execution" and r._field == "value_str" and r._value == "ACTIVE")
  |> group(columns: ["machine_id", "machine_name"])
  |> count()
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({
      _time: now(),
      _field: r.machine_name,
      _value: float(v: r._value) * poll / 3600.0
  }))
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_field", "_value"])

panels.title: ACTIVE calisma suresi (saat)

title: SE Havacilik - Tezgah OEE Genel Bakis
